# fromEOF

**Type Property**

Allocates space from the physical end of file.

## Declaration

```swift
static var fromEOF: FSVolume.PreallocateFlags { get }
```

## Discussion

When implementing this behavior, ignore any offset in the preallocate call. This flag is currently set for all [doc://FSKit/documentation/FSKit/FSVolume/PreallocateOperations/preallocateSpace(for:at:length:flags:replyHandler:)] calls.

## Declaring preallocation behaviors

- **contiguous**: Allocates contiguous space.
- **all**: Allocates all requested space or no space at all.
- **persist**: Allocates space that isn’t freed when deleting the descriptor.
